office_does: A state representative writes and votes on state laws and budgets, conducts oversight, and represents their legislative district.
race_blurb: A rural public-investment advocate challenges an incumbent legislator emphasizing tax relief, public safety, and accountable government.

candidates.summary: Zahn is a writer and photographer advocating rural public investment, union jobs, transit, sustainable development, and limits on data centers.
highlights: Supports rural public investment, union jobs, parks, housing, and public transit [S1]
Supports sustainable materials and stopping data centers [S1]

spending.basis: He explicitly centers rural public investment, parks, public transit, and health care.

experience.basis: He is a writer and photographer without a documented elected or institutional record.

tech.basis: He explicitly supports stopping data centers.

candidates.summary: Abbarno is an incumbent state representative, former councilmember, attorney, and small-business owner emphasizing tax relief and public safety.
highlights: Supports tax relief and accountable government [S1]
Supports public safety and economic and educational opportunity [S1]

safety.basis: He makes public safety a stated priority, though the dossier provides no detailed enforcement proposal.

experience.basis: He has served as a state representative since 2021 and previously served on the Centralia City Council.
